description.ko: 유동적인 형태가 빛과 그림자의 리드미컬한 춤 속에서 융합되고 진화하는 자연스러운 연속성에 대한 시각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of natural continuity, where fluid forms merge and evolve in a rhythmic dance of light and shadow.

prompt: Cinematic 3D render of fluid organic shapes, iridescent liquid metal flowing through a void, soft volumetric lighting, bioluminescent pulses, macro textures of silk and water, 8k resolution, elegant curves, harmonious composition, ethereal atmosphere.
